name: robotframeworkresultanalyzer

metadata.name: RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer
metadata.license: The GNU General Public License v3.0
metadata.summary: Robot Framework listener to generate understandable output of test results

documentation:
# rf-result-analyzer
rf-result-analyzer is a tool designed to analyze Robot Framework test results with AI-powered insights using AnythingLLM. The repository includes demo tests, a custom listener to capture test execution data, and prompts for automated failure analysis and improvement suggestions.

modules.name: RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer
documentation:
RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer module.
This module provides the RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer class, which is imported from the listener module.
The class is included in the __all__ list to specify the public interface of the module.

modules.name: RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer.listener
documentation:
This module defines a custom Robot Framework listener, `RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer`, 
which generates a summary of test results and writes them to a specified output file.

classes.name: RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer.listener.RobotFrameworkResultAnalyzer
documentation:
A listener for Robot Framework that generates a summary of test results.
Attributes:
    ROBOT_LISTENER_API_VERSION (int): The version of the Robot Framework listener API.
    output (str): The file path where the test summary will be written.
    test_summary_file (TextIO): The file object for writing the test summary.
Methods:
    __init__(output="test_summary.txt"):
        Initializes the listener with the specified output file.
    end_test(data: running.TestCase, result: result.TestSuite):
        Called when a test case ends. Writes the test summary to the output file.
    close():
        Closes the test summary file.
